rulePrefixes.foundation: Installation, project shape, OutputType=Exe model, source generator, runner wiring, Microsoft.Testing.Platform integration, IDE configuration, and platform constraints
rulePrefixes.data: Parameterized tests, Arguments attribute, MethodDataSource, ClassDataSource, TestDataRow, matrix tests, combined data sources, nested data sources, generic attributes, and IDataSourceGeneratorAttribute
rulePrefixes.lifecycle: Before and After hooks at Test/Class/Assembly/TestSession/TestDiscovery scopes, BeforeEvery/AfterEvery, hook execution order, property injection, IAsyncInitializer, IAsyncDiscoveryInitializer, and dependency injection construction
rulePrefixes.assertions: Assert.That entry point, async assertion model, unawaited-assertion pitfall, value assertions, collection assertions, async and exception assertions, combining assertions, Assert.Multiple, member assertions, and custom assertion extensibility
rulePrefixes.execution: Parallel-by-default behavior, ParallelLimiter<T>, NotInParallel, DependsOn, test ordering, retries, repeats, timeouts, test filters, skip, explicit, CI/CD reporting, engine modes, and AOT constraints
rulePrefixes.mocking-extending: TUnit.Mocks beta library, mock setup and verification, argument matchers, ITestRegisteredEventReceiver, custom test attributes, data source generators, argument formatters, dynamic tests, and built-in extension points
rulePrefixes.migration: Behavioral differences from xUnit, NUnit, and MSTest, attribute equivalence, class and method lifecycle mapping, assertion API differences, and step-by-step migration guidance
